---
title: "Project Telemetry"
author: "John Gavin"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    page-layout: full
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show code"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Project Telemetry}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

{{< include ../inst/qmd/telemetry.qmd >}}
